caption:
This is what people miss about real growth.

Pedro didn’t start by charging.
He started by helping.

He trusted the process, shared the play, and gave value before asking for anything back.

That one decision created momentum, relationships, trust, and eventually opportunity at a level most people never reach.

Not because he chased exposure.
Because he earned it.

Value given freely has a way of coming back louder than any launch strategy.

🎙️ Catch the full episode of Wealth Made Simple on YouTube.

caption:
I just had a 5 hour call with two of the people closest to me. 

Why? Because we were communicating with one another, but not getting anywhere.

Sometimes you may think you communicated your message clearly, yet the people or person you were communicating with heard something entirely different.

Gaining REAL clarity is the only way to ensure this doesn’t happen. 

The longer you go without clarifying things, the longer they take to sort out. Sounds obvious, but holds so many people back— in business, and in life.

Clarity drives speed.

I’ve been taking a lot of extra time lately to clarify things with the people I work with, and the people I love, to make sure we are truly on the same page.

Because when everything is clear for the everyone involved, we can all move faster, together.

#entrepreneur #entrepreneurship #businessgrowth #personalgrowth #wisdom

latestComments.text: I done the 31 Day Challenge  a couple  yrs ago. I want too do the 818 partner with you.

One of my favorite top topics. So good! The world is full of information. The clear difference is application of the skill of communication. Many leaders struggle with this and diminish their influence and leadership. What I am learning more in depth everyday: We communicate even when we don’t communicate. So many ways to communicate, we tend to be linear and mostly focus on ONE (verbal). And neglect the others: nonverbal, visual, written. For example: Non communication is communication, whether physical, verbal, or textual. When communication is not clear and aware of the different dimensions: Non communication can be translated as dismissal, invalidation and neglect. Another thing: Speech without listening or seeking to understand is a form of communication and/or invalidation. In the same way, too much focus on empathy can create a dismissal of factual. People of faith do have the ability to develop multidimensional communication. In fact, we should be learning so. Sadly, the majority are stuck on categories, labels and what I call black and white thinking. Does the coin only have two sides? Or does it have three, and layers of dimensions? Love it!

This is something that kept coming up during the wisdom challenge and dealing with my offense with some of my closest friends - the expectations I had that I didn't even realize I had but the lack of communication was what kept hurting. The 15 minute conversation we had addressed and helped 2 months of my isolating from them in my offense (well 1 month of truly isolating from them and 1 month building up to that).

“God wants you poor.”
That’s what many Christians have been told, but it’s not what Scripture says.

The poverty gospel sounds humble, but it’s deception dressed as devotion.

– Deuteronomy 8:18 says God gives us the power to create wealth
– John 10:10 says Jesus came so we’d have life and have it abundantly
– 3 John 2 says God desires that we prosper and be in health

The devil steals, kills, destroys, and yes, that includes keeping believers broke.
God empowers, multiplies, and blesses — so His covenant is seen through your life.

You weren’t called to poverty.
You were called to purpose, provision, and partnership with Heaven.

🟧 What if the greatest testimony isn’t what you gave up… but what you built with what He gave you?

#PedroAdao #KingdomofGod #KingdomLife #ChristianLife #God

caption:
Religion says “God is in charge.”
The Kingdom says “You are.”

Not because you’re prideful, but because He designed it that way.

In Genesis, God made man and woman in His image…
and put us in charge of Earth.
He said: “Be fruitful. Multiply. Have dominion.”

Why?
So Heaven’s culture could be reflected here, through you.
– Heaven is perfect order
– Earth is your assignment
– Dominion is your calling

Every broken system, every injustice, every area out of alignment,
that’s not God’s fault.
That’s our responsibility.

You carry Heaven’s solutions for Earth’s problems.
It’s time to step into your authority,
to represent the King,
and to expand His Kingdom right where you are. 🌍

Now is the hour to rise — Heaven is waiting on you.

#PedroAdao #KingdomofGod #KingdomLife #ChristianLife #God

caption:
“God is in charge.”
It sounds right, but it’s only half true.

Yes, God rules heaven completely. 👑
But when He created Earth, He handed dominion to us.

He said: “Be fruitful and multiply. Have dominion.”
That means you and I were designed to steward, build, and govern what happens here.

– Heaven is God’s responsibility
– Earth is ours
– The problems we see are proof He delegated authority, not abandoned it

So when we look around and see chaos, injustice, or lack…
It’s not because God failed.
It’s because we haven’t stepped into the authority He gave us.

You were never meant to wait for heaven to fix Earth.
You were meant to bring heaven to Earth.

It’s not just faith.
It’s partnership.

#PedroAdao #KingdomofGod #KingdomLife #ChristianLife #God

I’ve coached thousands of ambitious Christians around the world,
and I’ve noticed one thing that keeps so many stuck:
the fear of making a mistake.

Religion taught us that failure equals punishment.
That mistakes mean God’s mad, people judge, and you lose your place.

But that’s not Kingdom thinking.

In the Kingdom:
– Risk is how faith is proven
– Courage is how calling is unlocked
– Mistakes are where revelation is born

The enemy wants you playing defense.
God’s waiting for you to take ground.

Every breakthrough you’ve prayed for is on the other side of one bold decision.
Stop letting fear disguise itself as holiness.

You were never called to play safe, you were called to move mountains. ⛰️

Today, end the fear of mistakes…
so God can trust you with greater assignments.

#PedroAdao #KingdomofGod #KingdomLife #ChristianLife #God
